_note: Addresses for the PND onchain-protocol reference. Two kinds of key: shared singletons (one canonical instance) and `*Implementation` keys (the shared logic contract that per-owner EIP-1167 clones delegatecall to, shown at the top of each clone's page). `catalog`, `auctionHouseFactory`, and `auctionHouseImplementation` are deployed; the Surface System keys (`surfaceFactory`, `defaultRenderer`, `renderAssets`, `sequentialImplementation`, `minterImplementation`) are pre-deploy and empty until launch. Fill an empty value and re-run `pnpm generate:docs` to resolve its address.
